on_screen_text: सलमान खान की प्रसिद्ध पूर्व Girlfriend कौन थीं? [Who was Salman Khan's famous ex-girlfriend?] / Kajol / Aishwarya Rai / Kareena Kapoor / Bank of India: + 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002 / अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App [Download Zinglish App to become the richest person in your family] / Zinglish: English Speaking App
summary: The ad uses a Bollywood trivia quiz and a fake bank credit notification to grab attention. It encourages downloading the Zinglish app to gain wealth, demonstrating its feature of translating English financial texts into Hindi.
